D.name: Criollo
D.ability_text: Once per scene, you may convert a Scum card into a Vengeance card or vice versa.

C.name: Paisà
C.ability_text: You may discard 3 Vengeance cards to gain 1 Reward.

H.name: Yankee
H.ability_text: Before a duel you are involved in, you may look at the top card of the deck and decide whether to leave it on top or place it on the bottom.

S.name: Chichimeca
S.ability_text: Whenever you suffer a wound, steal one Scum card from an opponent.
